title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 6.
summaries: "The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 6" by Mark Twain is the sixth part of a novel published in 1876. This section follows young Tom Sawyer and his friend Huckleberry Finn as they witness a murder, run away to become "pirates," and eventually find themselves entangled in a dangerous hunt for buried treasure. Tom must decide whether to break a blood oath to reveal the truth about a crime, while the vengeful Injun Joe lurks as a constant threat to the boys' safety.
